mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2CrXQx4C86zrDpC.917a8311ff66 --database nSYM6mnRbxMSZohhqYHu94 --execute 
-- Criar tabela temporária com os IDs mínimos (registros a manter)
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE keep_ids AS
SELECT MIN(id) as keep_id
FROM candidate_results
GROUP BY candidatoSequencial, uf, ano, turno;

-- Deletar todos os registros que não são os mínimos
DELETE FROM candidate_results
WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT keep_id FROM keep_ids);

-- Verificar resultado
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_after FROM candidate_results;
logs: ERROR 1105 (HY000) at line 3: 'CREATE TABLE ... SELECT' is not implemented yet
